holdings.infoBox: CHAU is an equity ETF with a total of 14 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily CSI 300 China A Share Bull 2X ETF (CHAU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the China Shenzhen SE / CSI 300 index. The fund provides daily 2x leveraged exposure to an index of the 300 largest and most liquid Chinese shares traded on the Shanghai and Shenzhen exchanges. CHAU was launched on Apr 16, 2015 and is issued by Direxion.
